name: ai-construction-copilot
description: AI Construction Copilot - AI Project Discovery (MVP)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n types,web -c gray,green "npm run dev:types" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared-types && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared-types && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
